description: Agentic workflow to fetch xView1 images from Greece and count the number of fetched images.
label: xView1 Image Fetching Workflow

participants.description: Agent to fetch xView1 images from the specified area of interest (Greece).
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: fetch_images_agent
config.description: Fetches images from xView1 dataset based on the specified coordinates.
config.system_message: You will fetch xView1 images from Greece.

participants.description: Agent to count the number of images fetched by the fetch_images agent.
participants.label: DatabaseAgent

config.name: count_images_agent
config.description: Counts the number of fetched images.
config.system_message: You will count the number of fetched xView1 images.
